framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.path: Publish research that becomes an industry-standard reference
paths.what_it_is: Write books or papers that practitioners across the industry cite and teach from, not just internal research memos kept inside one firm.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves your methods are rigorous enough to withstand outside replication and critique, not just internal sign-off — a bar a private research note never has to clear.

paths.path: Open-source your trading strategies and code
paths.what_it_is: Publish runnable, backtested strategy code and methodology in public, instead of keeping the edge entirely proprietary.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves your edge comes from a process and rigor you can defend in the open, not from opacity — a confidence a hidden black box can't demonstrate.

paths.path: Build a public quant training or credentialing platform
paths.what_it_is: Create a structured training or credentialing program that trains the next generation of quants at scale, rather than mentoring one analyst at a time.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can formalize expert judgment into something teachable and repeatable — a structuring skill well beyond running your own models.
